description: Authoring rules every candidate QuantConnect strategy must satisfy. Consumed by the Modeling agent and the validator. See docs/11.
workflow: retrieve relevant patterns via search_knowledge (corpus=contract, repo, strategy_library)
QC create_compile + read_compile — fix ALL warnings
evaluate the sealed holdout EXACTLY ONCE
write /workspace/results.json with BOTH in-sample and sealed-holdout segments
hand off to the Risk auditor
forbidden: natural language in code (the body must be valid Python)
import os | import sys | import subprocess | import requests (no arbitrary IO/network)
reading validation or holdout data during feature construction
hand-joined future-timestamped data (use QC PIT data only)
overwriting QC indicator method names (use self._rsi = self.rsi(...), not self.rsi = ...)
calling create_optimization without an approved, ledgered request (always_ask gated)
